displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Made with 11 secret spices infused with real chillies that are slow cooked to perfection, it is no surprise why this is every Singaporeans’ favourite. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
Directions:
• For Soup
1. Bring 2 cups of water (350ml) to boil
2. Add in noodle cake, soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Cook for 2 minutes and enjoy!
• For Dry
1. Cook noodle cake for 1 minute and drain off the water
2. Fry noodles with soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Enjoy!

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Palm Oil, Starch, Potassium Chloride, Sugar, Chilli, Wheat Flour, Yeast, Garlic, Maltodextrin, Coriander, Flavourings (contain soya), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate, Onion, Cumin, Citric Acid, Aniseed, Tumeric, Caramel, Ginger, Fenugreek, Canola Oil, Clove, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Paprika Guar Gum, Anti-caking Agent (E551).
• May contain: Crustaceans, Fish, Milk, Celery and Mustard

• Curry Paste: Palm Oil, Onion, Garlic, Dried Shrimp, Ginger, Lemongrass, Chilli Sauce, Sugar, Salt, Contains Permitted Preservatives (Benzoic Acid)
• Seasoning: Non-Dairy Creamer, Salt, Sugar, Hydrolysed Vegetable Protein, Corn Starch, Palm Oil. Contains Permitted Thickener (Maltodextrin) and Flavour Enhancers (Monosodium Glutamate, Yeast Extract, Disodium 5'-Inosinate)

metaData.Key Information: Myojo Instant Noodles feature authentic local flavours satisfying cravings for generations. Myojo first launch in the Singapore market more than 40 years ago and continues to be the best seller today. Some of the uniquely available unique flavours include Thai Tom Yam, Chicken Abalone, Korean Kimchi, Curry Chicken, Shrimp Tanmen, Chilli Crab, Prawn Noodles, Char Mee and Mee Poh. One can now enjoy hawker fares at the comforts of their own home. What’s more, this range is Halal certified to cater to all. So now everyone can enjoy Myojo! What are you waiting for? Try them all today!
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Put noodles into 450ml of boiling water in a pot and boil
2. Cook for 4 minutes
3. Remove pot from heat and put seasoning powder to the noodles
4. Mix well and serve immediately
metaData.SAP Product Name: MYOJO INSTANT NOODLES - CHICKEN ABALONE 5S X 80G 400G
